overall.description: Third-person survival horror gameplay footage featuring a male character exploring dark industrial basement corridors with a flashlight. The character encounters a female NPC in a red jacket and continues through pipe-lined hallways before entering a cluttered office space.

events.description: character walks through doorway leaving the storage locker area into darker corridors

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously through a dark corridor, flashlight illuminating metal storage cabinets on both sides

entered.detail: tall gray metal lockers lining both sides of the narrow corridor
stained bare concrete walls with dark patches
scattered dirt and debris covering the concrete floor

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow storage corridor lined with metal lockers on both sides. The flashlight illuminates the stained concrete walls and debris-covered floor as the character approaches a doorway at the end of the hall.

events.description: character encounters a woman in a red jacket standing in the corridor doorway

agents.ego_description: walking through dark industrial corridors and passing a woman in a red jacket who stands in the doorway

notable_agents.action: woman in red jacket and black skirt standing in doorway, steps aside to let character pass

entered.detail: rusted metal door frame connecting corridor sections
exposed metal pipes running vertically along the wall

segments.scene_description: The character moves through dark industrial corridors with metal doorways and exposed piping. A woman in a red jacket stands prominently in a doorway at the end of the hall, stepping aside as the character approaches and passes by.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial hallway with exposed steam piping

events.description: ambient light increases slightly as character passes small basement windows

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through long basement corridors lined with steam pipes and brick walls

entered.detail: red brick walls with visible mortar and water stains
large diameter industrial steam pipes with valve wheels
small rectangular window high on wall letting in dim natural light
rusted metal safety railing along the corridor wall

segments.scene_description: The character traverses a long industrial basement corridor characterized by exposed red brick walls and large steam pipes. Small windows high on the walls provide minimal ambient light, creating a dim atmosphere as the character walks past metal railings and valves.

scene_state.functional_zone: cluttered office room with desks and papers

events.description: character enters a furnished office space from the industrial corridor

agents.ego_description: entering a cluttered office space and examining the desks scattered with papers and office supplies

entered.detail: green metal desk cluttered with papers and office supplies
window with blinds partially open showing greenery outside
loose papers strewn across the floor and desk surfaces
red desk lamp providing warm artificial light
cork bulletin board with papers pinned to the wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a cluttered office room from the industrial corridor, revealing a space with green walls, scattered papers, and office furniture. A desk lamp provides warm light near a window showing the outside, while papers and files cover the surfaces of metal desks and shelves.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a series of oppressive industrial corridors that eventually opens into a cluttered office space. It begins in a narrow storage hallway lined with metal lockers, where a flashlight cuts through the darkness to illuminate stained concrete and debris. As the camera moves forward, the environment shifts into a network of industrial corridors with exposed piping, passing a woman in a red jacket who steps aside to let the character through. The scene then transitions into a long basement stretch characterized by red brick walls and large steam pipes, with minimal ambient light filtering through high windows. Finally, the camera leaves the industrial gloom and enters a green-walled office room filled with scattered papers and metal desks illuminated by the warm glow of a desk lamp.
